doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The document invents subsections and content not found in the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5, which addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers rather than paralegal supervision rules or enumerated definitions of "practice of law" in the f
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: The real ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses unauthorized and multijurisdictional practice by lawyers, not paralegal supervision rules or enumerated definitions of "practice of law" in subsections (a)–(c) as presented here; the text's structure, content, and invented subsections (b) and (c) do not match the actual rule language, which contains subsections addressing out-of-state practice by lawyers, not paralegal conduct.
